summary: Describes how to configure the automatic generation of unique application numbers (e.g., application form numbers) for admission leads. This setup allows defining prefixes, suffixes, and a starting number, which the system then uses to auto-update a counter for each new lead.
navigation: Admission module > Admission Setup > Admission Master > Application Number Setup
steps: Select the specific course or program for which numbering is to be configured, or choose "All" for a universal setup.
Specify the starting number for the sequence.
The system will automatically assign and increment application numbers as new leads are added.
business_rules: Each application receives a unique, auto-generated number.
The counter automatically updates with each new lead.
important_notes: This setup is crucial for uniquely identifying each application.
The process is similar to setting up registration numbers for students.
questions: How do I set up automatic application numbering in the Admission module?
Where can I configure prefixes and suffixes for application form numbers?
Can I have different numbering sequences for different courses?
